rows.message: The stage is set for a memorable race.
The track is dry, so they may need to watch\ntheir feet.
But there are some Umamusume who prefer the\ntrack like this.
When the ground is as tightly packed as it is\ntoday, it's easier to build up speed.
I hope the weather holds out for us.
Japanese tracks do have good drainage.
If the rain gets bad, it could prove to be a\nrather difficult race.
It may be easier to build speed, but I'm worried\nabout the strain on their legs.
When the track is this soft, it all depends on\nwhether or not you're good at handling it.
The track is going to be fairly treacherous\ntoday. Positioning is going to play an important\nrole.
When the track is this rough, it's impossible to\nguess how things will turn out.
These are less than ideal track conditions, to\nbe sure.
I'm concerned about how much the snow will\naffect today's race.
They can't run without taking the snow into\naccount.
A snowy winter wonderland might sound nice,\nbut it's no good for running on.
We'll find out today who likes the snow and\nwho doesn't.
What a presence! Look at that spirit!
Let's hope for a dead heat. That's when the\nsparks fly.
I just hope the Umamusume I'm rooting for\ngives it her all today!
Those two certainly know how to make a great\nstart.
She's the master of making a good start.
That was a perfect start.
They might have been waiting to see how\neveryone else would move.
They all seem to be in the zone. This should be\na good race.
Let's hope that those who made a late start can\ncatch up.
%h_player is running smoothly.
%h_player is skipping right along.
They should make good rivals.
We're only just getting started. I hope she\nstays motivated!
She's in a difficult position, but we can still\nhope for a comeback.
We're only just getting started. We can still\nhope for a comeback.
She's in a difficult position, but I hope she\nstays motivated!
They certainly are keeping each other in check.\nIt'll all depend on when they make their move.
Things are getting tense now, but they might\nwant to focus on their pace.
What a bold strategy! This is completely\nunexpected!
What a bold strategy! This should be an\neventful race!
This really suits\n%h_rank1's running style.
From that position, she can easily see what's\ngoing on around her. She's proceeding\nsmoothly.
This must be her strategy. Her final burst's\ngoing to be a sight to behold.
Apparently, praying at the nearby shrine for\ngood luck with romance is all the rage these\ndays.
It's almost like she's checking the condition of\nthe track as she runs. She's not putting her all\ninto it yet.
She seems to be a little rushed. I hope she can\nget a chance to breathe.
She might be feeling rushed. I hope she finds\ntime to catch her breath.
She seems to be a little rushed. I hope she\nfinds time to catch her breath.
She might be feeling rushed. I hope she can\nget a chance to breathe.
She looks a little strained, but it's fine. She's\nabout to start showing her real skills!
It might become a little confusing with all of\nthem packed together like this.
They might have a hard time deciding when to\nmake their move in this race.
She seems to be panicking. Is she worried\nabout the distance in front of her?
It's time to put it all on the table! They're\napproaching the decisive final stretch!
She's pulled ahead a little.
This should be a good race for our racers to test their mettle.
We can expect a good run from each of these\nUmamusume.
The track is dry and sandy, so this race could\nrequire a bit more strength.
As an expert on the dirt, she should be able to\nshow off her full skill today.
I'm definitely interested in seeing how these\ntwo race today.
How will those in the rear respond to the pace\nset by these two?
The battle for a good position should be fierce\ntoday.
Let's see who takes the lead first.
These two should make for a good race.
I can see this race ramping up quickly.
I think she's betting on a showdown during the\nfinal stretch. I'm looking forward to it!
Making it to the front doesn't look like an easy\ntask.
It looks like they're keeping each other in\ncheck.
Everyone seems to be maintaining their own\npace.
I'm curious as to whether the runners in the rear\nwill make it to the front.
Will she come from the inside or the outside?!\nWe're in the final phase now!
I can't look away! What are these Umamusume\ngoing to do?!
Here comes the last spurt! The race is really\nheating up now!
I'm worried that she'll run out of stamina.
I hope she can regain her composure.
It might become a little confusing with all of\nthem packed together like this.
Making it to the front doesn't look like an easy\ntask.
I'm hoping for the birth of a star on the dirt\nhere today.
She's definitely a top contender to be spring\nstar of the sprint.
I'd love to see her prove her skills by winning\nthe first leg of the Spring Triple Crown.
I'd love to see her win the first Triple Tiara race\nand be crowned the queen of the cherry\nblossoms.
If it's sheer speed that wins the Classic Triple\nCrown, then it might just be her.
I'd love to see her show off her unbelievable\nskills and win the spring Tenno Sho.
I'd love to see her become the new ruler of the\nmile amongst the greenery in Fuchu.
I'd love to see her give a run that amazes even\nthe goddess of victory.
I'd love to see her win the second Triple Tiara\nrace and be crowned the queen of the oaks.
I'd love to see her realize her dreams and\nbecome the Derby champion.
I'd love to see her show off her speed and\nshine as the spring ruler of the mile.
She carries the dreams of the most fans on her\nshoulders today. I'd love to see her shine as\ngrand prix champion.
With her popularity, I'd love to see her\ncrowned as the fall star of the sprint.
I'd love to see her amazing stride win her the\nthird Triple Tiara race.
I'd love to see her prove she's the greatest of\nher generation by winning the last race of the\nClassic Triple Crown tour.
I'd love to see her run at the top of the\nmedium-distance races and win the autumn\nTenno Sho.
She has enough skill to take the queen's crown\nfor herself.
I'd love to see her shine as the ruler of the mile\nwith her overwhelming speed.
I'd love to see her show off the stunning stride\nthat makes her the representative of Japan.
Her speed is incredible on the dirt. I'd love to\nsee her shine as the champion.
I'm hoping to see her crowned as the new\nqueen for next year's Tiara tour.
I'd love for her to show her strength and aim\nfor next year's Classics.
I'd love to see her win the last race of the year\nand live up to her name of greatest grand prix\nchampion.
I'd love to see her take this big step toward the\nClassics.
I'd love to see her run like the true champion\nof the first half of this season's dirt tour.
I'm hoping for the birth of a star on the dirt\nhere today in Oi.
I'd love to see her shine as the heroine of the\ndirt with some amazing running.
I'd love to see her show off her skills as the\nfastest Umamusume in the dirt racing world.
I'd love to see her prove her dominance as the\ngreatest Umamusume on the dirt tour.
As the sun sets here in Oi, I'm hoping to see\nsome great running to finish off the dirt tour.
She looks like she's in perfect shape.
She seems to be in a great mood.
She's not looking on top of her game today.
She seems a little halfhearted.
It doesn't look like she's in the mood to race.
She should be able to show what she's fully\ncapable of on this turf.
I'm looking forward to seeing some powerful\nrunning on the dirt.
I'm a little worried as to whether or not she can\nshow her full potential on this turf.
I wonder how she'll handle this dirt track.
This will be a great opportunity for her to show\noff her endurance.
We can expect a good run from her on a\ndistance like this.
Considering her great affinity for mile races,\nI'm hoping to see some amazing running from\nher.
Her explosive power is perfect for sprints.
She'll find this race challenging given the\ndistance.
I wonder if she'll be able to adjust to the pace\nof this medium-distance race.
I'm worried about whether her pace will suit\nthis mile race.
Will the split-second dynamics of a sprint suit\nher?
I'd love to see her make a dramatic late charge\nfrom the back.
I'm hoping to see her make an explosive late\nsurge.
I'd love to see her stick just behind the leader\nand seize victory at the end.
If she can take the lead and dictate the pace,\nshe'll be hard to catch.
If she hangs in the back, she might not make it\nin time.
She doesn't have the turn of foot to make a\nbreak for it at the end, so I'm not sure this is\nthe strategy for her.
She's not the best at staying in the front, so I'm\na little worried.
I'm worried about whether she can stay calm\nafter taking the lead.
Her ability is definitely top class. You can feel\nthe presence radiating from her.
With both popularity and power, this runner is\nmy personal favorite.
She has such good form that she's even\ndrawing attention in the paddock.
She may not be the favorite, but she's equal in\ntalent.
What a magnificent presence. This runner is my\npersonal favorite.
She's in just as good shape as the favorite.
She may be third favorite, but she's skilled\nenough to surprise everyone.
There's something about her that just shines.\nThis runner is my personal favorite.
She certainly looks as ready as the rest of the\ngroup.
Her rivals are strong, but I'm hoping for a good\nrun regardless.
This is a somewhat difficult matchup, but I'm\nhoping she does her best.
It may be difficult for her to place high, but I'd\nlove to see her benefit from the experience.
She has both incredible speed and explosive\npower.
She's running to the best of her ability, but I'd\nlike to see some more speed and power from\nher.
One of her best qualities is her extraordinary\nendurance, which allows her to make use of her\nspeed for longer.
She needs to find a balance between her\nacceleration and endurance.
Her persistence on the final stretch is really\nnoteworthy.
She needs to be careful with her pacing. I'd\nlike to see her focus on the mental game.
She's in good shape for this race. All that training has her fit and fearless.
Her legs seem to be in excellent shape. I think we'll see a good performance.
While she's not the favorite, I'm seeing a promising flexibility in her form.
We've got a strong lineup, so I'm hard-pressed to pick a favorite. If I had to say though, I think I'll be keeping my eyes on this one.
While she hasn't gotten much attention, I've got a suspicion this one's going to be a sleeper hit. I'm certainly rooting for her.
I want to see her fly across the turf like a star shoots through the sky—and show us a beautiful burst of pure speed.
This racer's got both power and speed—she's undeniably the star of the mile.
I'd love to see this racer topple legends and become a true star on the turf.
This racer's got plenty of stamina. I'm looking forward to seeing her shine—eternal as starlight.
Like a star on a clear desert night, this racer's sure to shower fans with hope.
I'm seeing lots of confident faces!
They're in the gates—and everyone is looking sharp.
With such an electric atmosphere, it seems like we're in for a special race today!
With our racers looking cool and calm at the gates, we're surely in store for an impressive race!
This racer's got an air of determination about her. Keep your eyes peeled!
Which runner will shine the brightest? We'll find out in the Twinkle Star Climax—starting now!
With all these talented runners competing today, we won't have a second to blink!
Which of these racers will be first across the finish line? It's about time to get started!
Glory lies ahead for the fastest... and our competitors are on their way!
With the brilliance of shooting stars, our runners charge around the final corner!
Will the front-runners keep their lead? Or will the late surgers who saved their strength blast ahead? It's the moment of truth!
She's done it! At the pivotal moment, she's proven herself the brightest star on the track!
Special Week! That was certainly a run befitting the Ruler of Japan!
Silence Suzuka! It's clear just why she's known as the Otherworldly Front-Runner—that lead was hers!
Tokai Teio! This miraculous runner could surpass even the Emperor herself!
Maruzensky! This hot rod cruised down the track, handily leaving everyone else in her dust!
Fuji Kiseki! What a gem of a runner she is, dazzling and inspiring us all!
Oguri Cap! Not only is she the crowd's beloved idol, she's also the strongest runner on this track!
Gold Ship! The battleship has once again proven she's unsinkable! Another splendid performance by this golden racer!
Vodka! The Extraordinary Empress does as she pleases, striking a bold path uniquely her own!
Daiwa Scarlet! With another perfect run, she's proven herself number one to us all!
Taiki Shuttle! With speed and power alike, she's shown the crowd a rootin' tootin' good run!
Grass Wonder! With refined steps, this runner of pure virtue mastered today's track, politely collecting a resounding victory.
Hishi Amazon! Her unfaltering power and prestige is truly befitting of the title "Queen of the Amazons!"
Mejiro McQueen! She's making a name for herself with elegant, unstoppable strides, never shying away from the prestige her family holds!
El Condor Pasa! The Phantom Bird snatches the lead with a run that will carry her across the seas and skies!
T.M. Opera O! The Centurial Overlord plays the lead role in yet another dramatic race. Can no one stop her?!
Narita Brian! She dominated the race with strength that can only be described as ferocious. What a beast!
Symboli Rudolf! The Emperor honors her title with dignity, bestowing unto us another stunning race!
Air Groove! The Empress treated us to a breathtaking display of her abilities, showing how she aims for the highest of standards!
Agnes Digital! Just as a hero is always there for you, Agnes Digital never backs down from a race!
Seiun Sky! The elusive, cloud-like Trickster has once again fooled us all with her shrewd tactics!
Tamamo Cross! Like a flash of lightning, she struck the goal with blinding speed!
Fine Motion! She couldn't resist the call of victory—the glory she seized today is priceless!
Biwa Hayahide! She put her winning equation in motion and showed just why she's heralded as the strongest of her generation!
Mayano Top Gun! She's got talent like no other and knows just how to show it off on the track!
Manhattan Cafe! Cutting through the darkness, she rises above all else as a skyscraper of victory!
Mihono Bourbon! She saw her mission through and achieved perfect victory with the calculated precision of a cyborg!
Mejiro Ryan! Demonstrating the fruits of her steadfast training, she's done her family name proud!
Hishi Akebono! She's always taking big steps to her goals, and savored an extra big win today!
Rice Shower! No matter how fearsome the race, she stays true to herself—just like a storybook hero!
Ines Fujin! She stormed through like a raging wind and seized the crown!
Agnes Tachyon! She looked faster than light out there! What a spectacle to see our dreams brought to life!
Admire Vega! Her resolve is second to none. She showed a determination that shined brighter than any other star in the sky!
Inari One! Her sleek, refined running has shown everyone why she's the greatest there is!
Winning Ticket! Placing her hopes on this race, she showed us a run worthy of leading a new generation!
Air Shakur! Using a logic all her own, she's proven to be the undisputed best on the track!
Eishin Flash! She truly demonstrated her perfectionism out there with all the pride and resolve in her heart!
Curren Chan! She stole countless hearts today with that absolutely dazzling run!
Kawakami Princess! She overcame the rivals around her and fought her way to the front like a true princess!
Gold City! She ran with her whole soul on the line, proving her resolve is unyielding!
Sakura Bakushin O! No fuss or frills—just pure, straightforward speed from the Bakushin King!
Sweep Tosho! With that swift explosion of speed, her run was truly magical!
Super Creek! She set a leading example for her peers with her sound abilities and judgment!
Smart Falcon! All eyes were on her for this race! She's a true top Umadol!
Tosen Jordan! She ran today with indestructible form, proving she won't let anyone break her gutsy spirit!
Narita Taishin! This runner's the fastest of her generation and her big win today further proves it!
Nishino Flower! With a run both beautiful and inspiring, she bloomed into a champion today!
Haru Urara! She took first place with indomitable determination, like a beautiful spring ending a long, bitter winter!
Matikanefukukitaru! You can tell how much faith she has in herself—true to her name, she brought fortune home today!
Meisho Doto! Her budding confidence blossoms further with each race. Not even the Overlord can stop her!
Mejiro Dober! She has conviction befitting the Mejiro name. What an impressive run!
Nice Nature! All her growth has culminated in this first-place win—the crowd is going wild!
King Halo! The King crushes fearsome opposition to seize her gloried throne!
Matikanetannhauser! With her mind set on winning, this bright, eager runner heard her fans' cheers and responded in kind!
Mejiro Palmer! Her prestigious lineage can't constrain her! She showed us what running free truly means!
Satono Diamond! What an amazing success! She carried all the hopes and wishes entrusted to her and blazed her own path to victory!
Kitasan Black! She accepted everyone's expectations with open arms and brought joy and confidence to us all with her victory!
Sakura Chiyono O! By her earnest efforts, this bud has opened into a radiant blossom!
Mejiro Ardan! In this brief, fleeting time, she's shown everyone a beautiful, blindingly powerful run!
Yaeno Muteki! With courage and spirit honed through intense discipline, she gallantly triumphed over her rivals!
Mejiro Bright! Inheriting the prestige of a noble family, she secured victory against the greatest challengers around!
